scene_title: Profeta em carmesim com pergaminho confirmado
narrative_beat: Raios dourados sobre profeta com robos P&B ao fundo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid prophet in crimson and ochre mantle holding open scroll in side profile with expression of confirmed vision and golden rays of light descending upon him in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the prophet's expression of confirmed vision with golden rays descending
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern technology center with operating robots in background
props: prophet in crimson and ochre mantle

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber gold highlights

mood.emotion: prophet sees his own vision being demonstrated in real time

symbolism.primary: the witness who wrote it watching it happen
symbolism.secondary: open scroll as evidence matching the operational robots behind

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
